services.processDescription: A simple delivery flow keeps projects clear, practical, and easy to follow.
services.step1Text: Understand your systems, goals, and operational needs before any solution is proposed.
services.step2Text: Shape a practical delivery plan around software, consultancy, and support priorities.
services.step3Text: Build, configure, or improve the solution with clear milestones and communication.
services.step4Text: Review outcomes, refine the work, and support the next phase when needed.

faq.q1: What cybersecurity services does GUE CYBER provide?
faq.a1: We provide comprehensive cybersecurity services including security audits, vulnerability assessments, endpoint protection, network security, security awareness training, and incident response planning for businesses of all sizes.
faq.a2: Yes — we specialize in cybersecurity and IT solutions for small businesses, schools, startups, NGOs, and organizations. We provide affordable, scalable security packages tailored to your budget and needs.
faq.q3: What IT services do you offer?
faq.a3: We offer IT consulting, computer systems setup, cloud services, backup solutions, Microsoft 365 security setup, and managed IT support to keep your operations running smoothly.
faq.q4: How do I get a security assessment?
faq.a4: Contact us through our website or call us for a free consultation. We offer security assessments to identify vulnerabilities before attackers do and provide actionable recommendations.

footer.description: Cybersecurity & IT solutions for small businesses, schools, organizations, and growing companies in Belgium and internationally. Cybersecurity audits, incident response, and managed IT security — practical services for business continuity.
